Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Nicolai Damslund. Author, maintainer.

  • Gudrun M W Bjørnelv. Author.
    Original MOON model (Bjørnelv et al. 2021, doi:10.1177/0272989X20971589)

  • Yufei Jiang. Author.
    Ported the MOON model from the original Excel/VBA implementation to R

  • Magnus Skov Larsen. Author.
    Ported the MOON model from the original Excel/VBA implementation to R

  • Christina Hansen Edwards. Author.

  • Vidar Halsteinli. Author.
    Original MOON model (Bjørnelv et al. 2021, doi:10.1177/0272989X20971589)

  • Rønnaug A Ødegaard. Author.
    Original MOON model (Bjørnelv et al. 2021, doi:10.1177/0272989X20971589)

  • Line Planck Kongstad. Author.

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Damslund N, Bjørnelv G, Jiang Y, Larsen M, Edwards C, Halsteinli V, Ødegaard R, Kongstad L (2026). moon: An R Package Implementing the Modeling Obesity in Norway (MOON) Markov Cohort Model. doi:10.5281/zenodo.20842690. R package version 0.1.1, https://dache-sdu.github.io/moon/. 

@Manual{,
  title = {moon: An R Package Implementing the Modeling Obesity in Norway (MOON) Markov Cohort Model},
  author = {Nicolai Damslund and Gudrun M W Bjørnelv and Yufei Jiang and Magnus Skov Larsen and Christina Hansen Edwards and Vidar Halsteinli and Rønnaug A Ødegaard and Line Planck Kongstad},
  year = {2026},
  note = {R package version 0.1.1},
  doi = {10.5281/zenodo.20842690},
  url = {https://dache-sdu.github.io/moon/},
}

On this page

Developed by Nicolai Damslund, Gudrun M W Bjørnelv, Yufei Jiang, Magnus Skov Larsen, Christina Hansen Edwards, Vidar Halsteinli, Rønnaug A Ødegaard, Line Planck Kongstad.
